title: rubus exornatus
intro: Rubus exornatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus exornatus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in the production of jams, jellies, and other food products.
